response.justification: Bogdan possesses over 15 years of software engineering experience and a strong entrepreneurial background, fulfilling the minimum requirements for the role. However, this is a Director-level position focused heavily on AI strategy and cloud platform innovation. Bogdan's career has primarily centered around full-stack web development and GIS platforms, with only very recent exposure to AI infrastructure. He lacks the deep, recognized AI expertise and strategic enterprise-level leadership required for this Principal Engineer role.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software, infrastructure, and web engineering experience.
Strong entrepreneurial background as the founder of an open-source Geo-Data platform.
Demonstrated commitment to technical community building through open-source projects and workshops.
concerns: Lacks deep, recognized expertise and a proven track record in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning.
Current and past roles (Senior/Staff) do not demonstrate Director-level strategic leadership experience.
Missing the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
